title: Resolve curvature-accounting condition: C1: A_curv diagnostic branch-filter
description: Sector: A_curv. Allowed condition: A_curv remains diagnostic / branch-filter or receives independent source-neutral dynamics. Forbidden condition: A_curv changes A-flux, selects boundary behavior after recovery failure, or becomes scalar curvature charge. Consequence: curvature admissibility can filter branches only if it does not become dynamics by vocabulary..
